title: Regime breakdown (frozen engine, validation only)

method.data: data_offline/ daily CSVs (gitignored); NQ/ES 2013-2025, MNQ/MES 2019-2025; no 2026; no data modified
method.windows: IS 2013-2022, OOS 2023-2025 streamed separately per market (matches D3/D5/D12)
method.trend_regime: DEGENERATE by construction: every entry requires close>EMA200 AND EMA50>EMA200, so 100% of trades are bull-stack. The trend filter IS the entry; it cannot discriminate trades.
method.volatility_regime: ATR20/close at the SIGNAL bar; low/mid/high split by 33rd/67th percentile computed mechanically from each market's IS trades only, then the SAME thresholds applied to OOS. No threshold chosen after seeing OOS.
method.year_regime: tagged by exit/realization year (matches prior year_R convention)
method.faithfulness_check: NQ IS 117/+7.6536/PF1.2016/DD10.5943 and OOS 32/+7.9990/PF1.7694/DD2.1827; ES IS 125/+7.6725/PF1.2003/DD16.7281 and OOS 27/+11.4584/PF2.2352/DD2.0697 -- all match the committed D3/D5/D12 overalls exactly.

proxy_micro_descriptive.note: MNQ (proxy of NQ) and MES (proxy of ES) are same-underlying micros, PARTIAL_IS from 2019-05-05. Descriptive only; NOT independent; cannot change the verdict. Their PARTIAL IS spans a different, shorter regime window and their own ATR%-tertiles differ.

concentration_findings.trend_regime: Degenerate: 100% bull-stack by construction; no discrimination possible.
concentration_findings.volatility_regime_cross_market_inconsist: NQ IS profit sits in MID vol (+7.14R, 93% of net) while HIGH vol is NEGATIVE (-0.77R, PF 0.92). ES IS profit sits in HIGH vol (+6.18R, 80% of net) while LOW vol is slightly NEGATIVE (-0.49R, PF 0.97). The edge does NOT live in the same volatility regime across the two primary markets -- a mixed/contradictory split, not a single consistent profitable regime.
concentration_findings.year_concentration_oos: OOS profit is single-year-dominated on BOTH markets: NQ 2024 = 61.7% of OOS net; ES 2025 = 72.8% of OOS net.
concentration_findings.shared_is_drawdown: Both markets share a deep 2014-2016 IS drawdown cluster (NQ 10.59R over 34 trades; ES 16.73R over 49 trades) -- the choppy post-2013 / 2015-2016 range was the hardest regime for the pullback-long edge on both.
concentration_findings.single_narrow_regime_dependence_note: Profit is NOT isolated to one tiny regime: it is spread across mid+high volatility and several positive years (NQ 2013/2017/2020/2021; ES 2013/2017/2019/2020/2021). The D14 hard blocker 'profit only from one narrow regime' did NOT fire.

verdict_basis.not_acceptable_reason: The volatility-regime profile is inconsistent across NQ vs ES (high-vol negative on NQ, high-vol best on ES) and OOS is single-year-dominated on both markets; cannot cleanly call regime risk acceptable.
verdict_basis.not_fail_reason: No major regime consistently destroys the strategy across both markets; ES does not contradict NQ in net direction (both IS and OOS positive); the shared 2014-2016 drawdown still recovered to net positive.
verdict_basis.inconclusive_over_concentrated_reason: Per-regime samples are small after splitting (OOS vol cells 0-17 trades; IS/OOS year cells a handful) AND the volatility split is mixed/contradictory between markets rather than a single consistent dominant regime, so the honest call is INCONCLUSIVE with flagged concentration cautions, not a clean CONCENTRATED-on-one-regime.
flags: 2025/recent-year carries most OOS profit (NQ 2024 61.7%, ES 2025 72.8%) -- flagged.
Volatility regime that carries profit differs by market (NQ mid, ES high) -- flagged.
Low/high-vol cells go negative on one market each (NQ high -0.77R; ES low -0.49R) -- flagged.
Small per-regime sample sizes after splitting -- flagged.

gate_decision.reason: No D14 hard blocker fired (profit is not from one narrow regime; ES does not contradict NQ). REGIME_RISK_INCONCLUSIVE permits proceeding cautiously to S26-D16 walk-forward/rolling-window stability -- which is precisely the test to resolve the temporal/single-year concentration this step flagged. It is NOT a clearance to paper trade.

trading_recommendation: NONE. No deployment, no paper, no live. S26 stays RESEARCH_CANDIDATE.
